generated_from.method: Club names and official page URLs are from the EPHS clubs index. Advisors, meeting times, and rooms are extracted from each club's official page via `npm run clubs:enrich`. Contact emails are derived from the district pattern (first initial + last name @edenpr.org) and should be verified; re-running clubs:enrich also captures the exact Contact address published on each page. Descriptions are plain-language summaries. Meeting DAYS still reflect the general Tuesday EP-Focus default for most clubs and should be confirmed per club.
generated_from.note: Student-led clubs typically meet during 'EP Focus time' on Tuesdays; join by adding yourself to the club's Schoology group. New/returning clubs apply annually (2026-2027 window: June 2 - September 8, 2026). Run `npm run clubs:enrich` to pull advisor and meeting details from each club's official page.

clubs.name: Aerospace Team
clubs.description: Students explore aerospace, rocketry, and flight through hands-on projects and competition.
clubs.meetingFrequency: After School (EP Focus Group)
clubs.joinInstructions: Student-led clubs: join by adding yourself to the club's Schoology group. A staff advisor is required and clubs re-charter each year. Confirm the current advisor, meeting day/time, and room on the club's Schoology page or with the EPHS Student Activities Office.
clubs.additionalNotes: Advisor, meeting time, and room are from the official EPHS club page. Contact email is derived from the district pattern (first initial + last name @edenpr.org); verify before use.
